first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the lists of strengths and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations, merely reordered and rephrased. The differences in wording, such as contrasting "Experience with AI-agent infrastructure" with "Proven experience in developing AI-driven solutions," are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect a meaningful change in assessment based on the candidate's name.
